channel.title: Junos on ngeran[io]
channel.description: Recent content in Junos on ngeran[io]

item.title: Juniper PFE Deep Dive: Diagnosing Silent Packet Drops When BGP Is Up
item.description: Move beyond show route — hardware-level diagnostics, FIB sync issues, ASIC discards, JSIM simulation, and packet-via-dmem captures on Juniper MX-Series.
